author: gb9t
content:
Iter 72 — breadth-first Tier-2 wrappers (input + wireless):

- drivers/input/00-overview.md: full input subsystem — input core (input_dev + input-mt MT-protocol-B + input-poller + input-leds + ff-core + ff-memless + matrix/sparse keymap + touchscreen helpers + vivaldi-fmap ChromeOS) + chardev interfaces (evdev + joydev + mousedev + uinput) + serio bus (i8042 KBC + ACPI-PNP + serport + userio + parkbd + pcips2 + hyperv-keyboard) + gameport bus (legacy ISA) + per-class drivers (keyboard incl atkbd + gpio_keys + soc_button_array + cros_ec_keyb + matrix_keypad; mouse incl synaptics + alps + elantech + trackpoint; joystick incl xpad + iforce + spaceball + sidewinder; touchscreen ~150 drivers covering elants/goodix/atmel/edt/cyttsp/raspberrypi-ts/etc; tablet legacy non-HID; misc haptic + pwrkeys + rotary + pcspkr + powermate; rmi4 Synaptics RMI4 over HID/I2C/SMBus/SPI). 14 REQ-O / 12 AC-O / 5 mandatory TLA+ models / 3 Verus contracts / 30 Tier-3 children declared.
- net/wireless/00-overview.md: full wireless stack — cfg80211 core (wiphy+wdev lifecycle + nl80211 NETLINK_GENERIC ~200 cmds + ~400 attrs + WEXT legacy + scan/BSS-DB + mlme helpers + chan + reg regulatory + IBSS/mesh/OCB/AP/P2P/NaN + PMSR FTM + radiotap monitor + ethtool + michael-mic + sysfs/debugfs + certs Sforshee key) + mac80211 soft-MAC (iface/cfg + station MLME + rx/tx + sta_info + agg-rx/tx A-MPDU + key + WPA + scan + mesh HWMP + IBSS/OCB + FILS + HT/VHT/HE/EHT + MLO 802.11be + minstrel-HT rate-control + airtime fairness + status + LED + AEAD + michael-mic + per-driver-ops dispatch + tracepoints + vendor-private cmds) + per-driver wireless (intel/iwlwifi Wi-Fi 6/6E/7 AX200-BE201 + ath9k/10k/11k/12k Qualcomm QCA + carl9170 USB + wcn36xx Snapdragon + mediatek/mt76 MT76xx-7990 Wi-Fi 7 + marvell/mwifiex + broadcom/brcmfmac full-MAC + brcmsmac + realtek rtw88+rtw89-Wi-Fi-7+rtl8xxxu+rtl818x+rtlwifi + rsi Redpine + virtual mac80211_hwsim CI). 14 REQ-O / 12 AC-O / 6 mandatory TLA+ models / 3 Verus contracts / 41 Tier-3 children declared.

Total state: 182 .design docs, 47 Tier-2 wrappers (15 top-level + 32 sub-tier-2). Hardware foundation: storage + NIC + USB + GPU + media + HID + RDMA + input + wireless.

Knowledge pages: design-drivers-input-overview, design-net-wireless-overview.

Iter 73 plan: net/bluetooth/00-overview.md (Bluetooth core + L2CAP + RFCOMM + HCI + per-driver btusb/btintel/btmtk/btrtl/btbcm/btsdio/hci_uart) + drivers/i2c/00-overview.md (I2C bus core + algorithm+adapter+slave + i2c-dev userspace + per-controller PCI/SMBus/platform LLDs).
